title: Climate Tech Firm Scepter, Inc. to Launch Methane-Detection Balloons in Texas' Permian Basin
text: SAN FRANCISCO--( BUSINESS WIRE )--On the heels of the COP27 climate summit, Scepter, Inc., an emerging company that uses global Earth- and air-based data to measure climate gases and air pollution in real time, has today announced it is set to launch in January a stratospheric balloon enabled with methane-detection sensors in Texas' Permian Basin, which will gather first-of-its-kind data on methane emissions.

title: Verisk to Present at J.P. Morgan Ultimate Services Investor Conference on November 17, 2022
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., Nov. 10, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Lee Shavel, chief executive officer of Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), and Elizabeth Mann, the company's chief financial officer, will speak at the J.P. Morgan Ultimate Services Investor Conference on Thursday, November 17, 2022.

title: Verisk Analytics, Inc. (VRSK) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Verisk Analytics, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSK ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 2, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Stacey Brodbar – Head-Investor Relations Lee Shavel – Chief Executive Officer Mark Anquillare – President and Chief Operating Officer Elizabeth Mann – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Ashish Sabadra – RBC Capital Markets Jeff Meuler – Baird Alex Kramm – UBS Financial Toni Kaplan – Morgan Stanley Manav Patnaik – Barclays Andrew Steinerman – JPMorgan Greg Peters – Raymond James George Tong – Goldman Sachs Andrew Jeffrey – Truist Securities Jeff Silber – BMO Capital Markets Faiza Alwy – Deutsche Bank Stephanie Moore – Jefferies Andrew Nicholas – William Blair Heather Balsky – Bank of America Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to the Verisk Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Results Conference Call. This call is being recorded.

title: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) Meets Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Verisk (VRSK) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 1.65%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Verisk Reports Third-Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., Nov. 01, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, today announced results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2022.
